transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good afternoon, First National Bank. My name is Michelle. Can I take your name and date of birth for security?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hello, it's Frank Osei, second of July 1975.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Osei, you're verified. How can I help today?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I withdrew two hundred pounds from an ATM this afternoon and only received one hundred and sixty. The machine didn't give me an error or a receipt.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's very concerning and I'm sorry that happened. Can I ask which ATM you used — do you have the location?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: It was on the high street — Barton Road, I think it's near the Halifax building.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. I'm logging an ATM cash discrepancy report right now. The ATM will be physically audited and if the machine is found to be over by forty pounds, it will be refunded to your account automatically within three to five working days. Your case reference is ATM-2024-3312.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: And if it turns out the machine balanced correctly?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: In that case we would review CCTV footage and you'd be able to provide a statement. These cases are resolved in the customer's favour in the vast majority of cases. Is there anything else?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No, that's very thorough. Thank you Michelle.
